# Yass

I build practical AI automation, agentic systems, and product systems for teams that need ideas to become reliable workflows. My work sits close to the messy middle of product, operations, and engineering: turning business processes into orchestration logic, integrations, retrieval flows, and AI-native tools that can survive real delivery environments.
